code:
import io
import string

let line_opt = io.read_line()
let line = match line_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
mut current = ""
mut idx = 0
mut output = ""
mut first = true

while i < n
  let b_opt = string.byte_at(line, i)
  let b = match b_opt
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end

  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if not string.is_empty(current)
      if idx % 2 == 0
        if first
          output = current
          first = false
        else
          output = "#{output} #{current}"
        end
      end
      idx = idx + 1
      current = ""
    end
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if not string.is_empty(current)
  if idx % 2 == 0
    if first
      output = current
    else
      output = "#{output} #{current}"
    end
  end
end

println(output)
